ddls:
CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size classification of the segment (e.g., large, small) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the segment (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the segment */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the segment */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel (e.g., Google, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of marketing channel (e.g., search, social, display) */,
  "average_cpc" REAL /* Average cost per click (CPC) for the channel */,
  "average_cpm" REAL /* Average cost per thousand impressions (CPM) for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing channel */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment being analyzed */,
  "spend" REAL /* Total amount spent on the marketing channel */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Total number of impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES marketing_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated campaign performance record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES campaign_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email associated with the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related campaign performance record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report as text */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES campaign_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment analyzed */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing channel */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent across campaigns */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales generated across campaigns */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES marketing_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user regarding the platform */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
